message:
refactor(commands): extract helpers module (Phase 2 start)

Extract utility functions to commands/helpers.rs:
- indent_lines: indent text with prefix
- humanize_duration: format seconds as human-readable
- urlencoding_encode: URL percent-encoding

This begins Phase 2 of bd-3ewx (splitting commands.rs).
Reduces mod.rs from 11,303 to 11,260 lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
